title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.010
text:
*262.010.  State horticultural society created. — "The Missouri State Horticultural Society" is hereby instituted and created a body corporate, to be named and styled as above, and shall have perpetual succession, power to sue and be sued, complain and defend in all courts, and to make and use a common seal and alter the same at pleasure.
(RSMo 1939 § 14032) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12365; 1919 § 11953; 1909 § 614 
*The state horticultural society was transferred to the department of agriculture, by type I transfer, by the Reorganization Act of 1974. 
Apple merchandising fund, society to authorize director of the department of agriculture to expend, how, 265.200 
Hawthorn blossom, state floral emblem, cultivation to be encouraged, 10.030
